description: Alpha-actinin-3 protein expression and muscle fiber performance phenotypes

source.title: ACTN3 genotype is associated with human elite athletic performance
source.authors: Yang N, MacArthur DG, Gulbin JP, et al.

TT.effect: Homozygous for stop codon, complete absence of alpha-actinin-3 protein. Associated with endurance athlete phenotype, better aerobic capacity but reduced sprint/power performance.

TC.effect: Heterozygous carrier expressing both R577 and X577 variants. Balanced muscle fiber profile with mixed endurance and sprint capacity.

CT.effect: Heterozygous carrier expressing both R577 and X577 variants. Balanced muscle fiber profile with mixed endurance and sprint capacity.

CC.effect: Homozygous for arginine at position 577, full expression of alpha-actinin-3 protein. Associated with sprint/power athlete phenotype, better fast-twitch muscle function and explosive power.
